comparison.interpretation_policy: Diagnostic only. Do not tune or select deployment behavior from OOS deltas.

conclusion: ยังสรุปไม่ได้
conclusion_reason: Target/stop diagnostics improved some OOS metrics, but the report is under-sampled and OOS results are not allowed as tuning input.

dsr_assessment.reason: This diagnostic compares two pre-specified exit behaviors and does not select a best Sharpe for deployment.

methodology.chronological_policy: 2023-03-01..2023-12-29 in-sample, 2024-01-02..2024-12-31 OOS; no OOS tuning from this diagnostic report
methodology.diagnostic_scope: Compare two pre-existing exit behaviors on identical Sub-System A candidate days.
methodology.entry_model: limit-style entry priced by fill model; no entry market orders
methodology.selection_policy: Do not select a live exit model from this OOS diagnostic; use it to decide the next pre-registered hypothesis only.
methodology.strike_mapping: nearest discrete strike selection inherited from generated strategy legs

sample_adequacy.power_note: Point Sharpe is diagnostic only until MinTRL/PSR are calculated on an experiment return distribution.

strategy: Sub-System A ORB directional debit vertical
